headline: Recovery actively underway. Jubilee scoring 50/100 and market signal is supportive (76% organic buying), with peg restoration and SLP fill as the primary near-term milestones.

subscores.label: Peg restoration
subscores.method: scaled from $0.66 (depeg low) → $0.98 (staking-ratchet halt, per SIP-420)

subscores.label: Jubilee progress
subscores.method: 50% structural ($10M Phase 2 target) + 50% burning ($60M target) — average

subscores.label: Net flow trend
subscores.value_text: Green: post-unlock outflow at 0.01% exit ratio
subscores.method: Sell-Pressure Radar alert level → green=90 / amber=50 / red=20
